framework.name: Human Override Kill Switch for Agent Systems
framework.description: Safety mechanism allowing human intervention to halt AI agent operations if they threaten human interests or overstep boundaries. Governance failsafe for autonomous systems.
framework.raw_quote: including an integrated kill switch mechanism, ensuring that if AI agents ever attempt to overstep boundaries or disrupt human livelihood, human oversight can immediately intervene

source.title: Nilfee powers USDC-based neo banking for humans, XYZ CREDIT is designed exclusively for AI agents.
